criteria.description: plugin.json passes `claude plugin validate --strict` with zero errors.
plugin.json has `name`, `version`, `description` (Ōēż 200 chars), `license`, `author`, and `dependencies` (may be empty for foundation plugins).
Each plugin declares a marketplace maturity `status` in `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`: stable, beta, experimental, or deprecated.
Plugin's always-on listing cost Ōēż 400 tokens per `claude plugin details`.
Plugin has README.md and CHANGELOG.md at the plugin root.
Every SKILL.md is Ōēż 500 lines and has frontmatter with `name` and `description` (Ōēż 200 chars).
If `.claude-plugin/templates.json` exists, every named template materializes from `registry/templates/` without error.
Connector plugins ship `.mcp.json`, `userConfig` with `title` + `description` + `sensitive: true` on credentials, and a `references/<service>-tools.md` doc.
Plugin has at least one fixture under `tests/golden/<plugin>/<scenario>.md` with parseable YAML frontmatter declaring `plugin`, `scenario`, and `expect`.
Plugin description and skill descriptions lead with an imperative verb (drives skill discovery).
Hook scripts are quiet by default ŌĆö only emit when they have something actionable to surface.
No secrets (API keys, tokens, PII) in any committed file. Verified by the `polymath-engineering` secret-scan hook plus a final pre-submission grep.
